name: Chang'e 6
fact: First sample return from the lunar far side — possibly the most scientifically significant lunar mission since Apollo. Far-side material (thicker crust, older surface, different composition) was completely unstudied. These samples may finally explain why the Moon's two hemispheres are so fundamentally different.
capability: Sample return from a relay-only site — combines the architectures of Chang'e 4 (far-side comms) and Chang'e 5 (sample return). The full set of capabilities for Mars Sample Return at any latitude.
